description_long: This nightstand is constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern, featuring a rectangular top surface and two spacious drawers. The drawers are fronted with simple round wooden knobs, and the lower drawer is shown partially open, revealing a hollow interior. The base of the nightstand has a subtle decorative trim and short, slightly curved feet that provide stability. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain running vertically, and the overall design is minimalist and functional. The nightstand's finish is matte, giving it a soft sheen without being glossy. Its sturdy build and ample storage make it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A light wood nightstand with two drawers, round wooden knobs, and a minimalist, functional design. The finish is matte, and the base features subtle curved feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers, the lower one partially open, with round wooden knobs and a clear view of the base trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel and the lower drawer partially extended outward.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lower drawer partially open, similar to view 1, showing the side panel and base.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
